brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Show me every service in the logs — registered or not — with their team and how many log lines they have.

template.text: tags['service'] as service, team, COUNT(*) as log_count
logs LEFT JOIN services ON tags.service = service_name

expected.sql: SELECT tags['service'] as service, team, COUNT(*) as log_count FROM logs LEFT JOIN services ON logs.tags['service'] = service_name GROUP BY tags['service'], team ORDER BY log_count DESC

hints.text: Carol: 'Query error. Group by both columns in the SELECT — tags[\'service\'], team.'
Carol: 'Wrong grouping. Include team in the GROUP BY so the NULLs show up separately.'
Carol: 'Too few rows. You may be collapsing the NULL team rows — group by tags[\'service\'], team.'
Carol: 'tags[\'service\'], team — both columns from the SELECT list.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text:
Most have a team. Two don't.

I'm going to need a minute.
